# Feature: Dynamic Model Fetching

## 1. Feature Goal

**ID**: FEAT-FP-001
**Source**: Feature Planner (self-contained — no plan file)

Replace the hardcoded `MODEL_DEFINITIONS` array with dynamic model fetching from provider APIs (Gemini, Ollama). Models are fetched eagerly when the ArenaChatToolbar mounts, and the user's last-selected model per provider is persisted in `ArenaSettings` so they don't have to re-select it each time. The `defaultModel` concept is removed from the global settings wizard.

## 2. Technical Context

> Standing rules (coding standards, architecture, testing, logging) are in `.spec-lite/memory.md` — only list **additions or overrides** here.

### Approach

- **Dynamic fetching**: Each implemented provider exposes a `listModels()` function in `packages/arena/src/providers/`. Gemini calls `GET /v1beta/models?key=...&pageSize=100` and filters by `supportedGenerationMethods.includes('generateContent')`. Ollama calls `GET /api/tags` and maps the richer response data. Both return `DynamicModelInfo[]`.
- **ArenaService**: The existing `ArenaService.getAvailableModels()` method is updated to call the provider-specific `listModels()` functions and no longer falls back to a static list.
- **Adapter boundary**: `IArenaAdapter.getAvailableModels()` is made non-optional. VS Code adapter relays to ArenaService via message passing. Web adapter calls provider APIs directly via fetch.
- **New hook**: `useArenaModels` in `packages/core/src/hooks/` fetches models via the adapter on mount (eagerly), caches results per provider, and exposes `{ models, isLoading, error, refetch }`.
- **Last-selected persistence**: `ArenaSettings` gains a `lastSelectedModels: Partial<Record<ArenaProviderType, string>>` field. When the user selects a model, it's recorded. On provider switch, auto-select the last-used model (or the first available).
- **Settings cleanup**: `defaultModel` is removed from `ArenaAppSettings`. The per-model toggle UI in `SettingsWizard` / `ArenaProviderCard` is removed (model list is no longer static).
- **Gemini pagination**: For now, send `pageSize=100` and make a single API call. Add a TODO for complete pagination.

### Spec-Specific Overrides

No overrides — see memory.

## 3. Data Model (Granular)

### Type Changes

- **`DynamicModelInfo`** (new, in `arenaConfig.ts`):
  - `id` (string) — model identifier (e.g. `gemini-2.0-flash`, `gemma4:e4b`)
  - `label` (string) — display name
  - `provider` (ArenaProviderType) — which provider this model belongs to
  - `inputTokenLimit?` (number) — max input context tokens (from Gemini API)
  - `outputTokenLimit?` (number) — max output tokens (from Gemini API)
  - `parameterSize?` (string) — e.g. `"8.0B"` (from Ollama API)
  - `quantizationLevel?` (string) — e.g. `"Q4_K_M"` (from Ollama API)
  - `description?` (string) — model description (from Gemini API)

- **`ArenaSettings`** (modified, in `arenaConfig.ts`):
  - Add `lastSelectedModels?: Partial<Record<ArenaProviderType, string>>` — persists last chosen model per provider

- **`ArenaAppSettings`** (modified, in `createSettingsSlice.tsx`):
  - Remove `defaultModel: string`

- **Removed types/constants from `arenaConfig.ts`**:
  - `ModelDefinition` interface — replaced by `DynamicModelInfo`
  - `MODEL_DEFINITIONS` array — removed entirely
  - `getModelsForProvider()` — removed
  - `getEnabledModels()` — removed (filtering by `disabledModels` no longer relevant with dynamic list)

### Relationships

- `DynamicModelInfo.provider` references `ArenaProviderType`
- `ArenaSettings.lastSelectedModels` is keyed by `ArenaProviderType`

### Indexes & Constraints

N/A — no database changes.

- `packages/arena/src/ArenaService.ts` — update `getAvailableModels()` to use provider-specific `listModels()`, remove static fallback
- `packages/arena/src/providers/index.ts` — export new functions
- `packages/arena/src/index.ts` — export new functions if needed
- `packages/vscode/src/webview/adapters/vsCodeArenaAdapter.ts` — implement non-optional `getAvailableModels()`
- `packages/web/src/` — update web arena adapter to implement `getAvailableModels()`

### Created

### Tests

- `packages/core/src/test/hooks/useArenaModels.test.tsx` — tests for the new hook

- `packages/arena/src/test/providers/ollama.test.ts` — tests for updated `listOllamaModels()`

## 5. Dependencies

- Gemini REST API (`GET /v1beta/models`) — external service
- Ollama local API (`GET /api/tags`) — local service
- `httpService` from `@wave-client/shared` — for making HTTP requests in `packages/arena/`

### TASK-003: Implement listGeminiModels() in arena provider

- [ ] **Implementation**:
  - In `packages/arena/src/providers/gemini.ts`:
    - Add `listGeminiModels(apiKey: string): Promise<DynamicModelInfo[]>` function
    - Call `GET https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=${apiKey}&pageSize=100`
    - Use `httpService.send()` (consistent with existing `validateGeminiApiKey`)
    - Parse response: `{ models: Array<{ name, displayName, description, inputTokenLimit, outputTokenLimit, supportedGenerationMethods, ... }>, nextPageToken? }`
    - Filter: only include models where `supportedGenerationMethods` includes `'generateContent'`
    - Map to `DynamicModelInfo[]`:
      - `id` = `model.name` (strip `models/` prefix if present, e.g. `models/gemini-2.0-flash` → `gemini-2.0-flash`)
      - `label` = `model.displayName`
      - `provider` = `'gemini'`
      - `inputTokenLimit` = `model.inputTokenLimit`
      - `outputTokenLimit` = `model.outputTokenLimit`
      - `description` = `model.description`
    - On failure (network error, non-2xx), return empty array and log warning
    - Add a `// TODO: Implement complete pagination using nextPageToken` comment
  - Remove or update the static `GEMINI_MODELS` array (it's a separate constant from `MODEL_DEFINITIONS`, used internally)
  - Export `listGeminiModels` from `packages/arena/src/providers/gemini.ts`
  - Export from `packages/arena/src/providers/index.ts` and `packages/arena/src/index.ts`
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: In `packages/arena/src/test/providers/gemini.test.ts`:
  - Mock `httpService.send()` to return a sample Gemini models response
  - Test that only models with `generateContent` in `supportedGenerationMethods` are returned
  - Test that `models/` prefix is stripped from model IDs
  - Test that on HTTP error, an empty array is returned
  - Test that `inputTokenLimit` and `outputTokenLimit` are correctly mapped
- **Verify**: `listGeminiModels('valid-key')` returns filtered `DynamicModelInfo[]` with correct fields. Tests pass.

### TASK-004: Update listOllamaModels() to return DynamicModelInfo[]

- [ ] **Implementation**:
  - In `packages/arena/src/providers/ollama.ts`:
    - Update `listOllamaModels(baseUrl: string): Promise<DynamicModelInfo[]>` (change return type from `string[]`)
    - Use `httpService.send()` instead of `fetch()` (consistent with `validateOllamaApiKey`)
    - Parse the full response: `{ models: Array<{ name, model, size, details: { parameter_size, quantization_level, family, ... } }> }`
    - Map to `DynamicModelInfo[]`:
      - `id` = `model.name`
      - `label` = `model.name` (Ollama models don't have separate display names)
      - `provider` = `'ollama'`
      - `parameterSize` = `model.details.parameter_size`
      - `quantizationLevel` = `model.details.quantization_level`
    - On failure, return empty array and log warning
  - Remove the static `OLLAMA_POPULAR_MODELS` constant (no longer needed)
  - Export `listOllamaModels` from `packages/arena/src/providers/index.ts`
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: In `packages/arena/src/test/providers/ollama.test.ts`:
  - Mock `httpService.send()` to return sample Ollama tags response (matching user's sample JSON)
  - Test that model name, parameterSize, quantizationLevel are correctly mapped
  - Test that on HTTP error, an empty array is returned
- **Verify**: `listOllamaModels('http://localhost:11434')` returns `DynamicModelInfo[]` with `parameterSize` and `quantizationLevel`. Tests pass.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001

### TASK-007: Create useArenaModels hook

- [ ] **Implementation**:
  - Create `packages/core/src/hooks/useArenaModels.ts`:
    - Hook signature: `useArenaModels(provider: ArenaProviderType, providerSettings: ArenaProviderSettingsMap): { models: DynamicModelInfo[], isLoading: boolean, error: string | null, refetch: () => void }`
    - On mount and when `provider` changes, call `adapter.arena.getAvailableModels(provider, providerSettings[provider])` via `useAdapter()` or `useArenaAdapter()`
    - Cache results per provider in a `useRef<Map<ArenaProviderType, DynamicModelInfo[]>>()` to avoid re-fetching when switching back
    - Set `isLoading = true` during fetch, `false` on complete
    - On error, set `error` string and `models = []`
    - `refetch()` clears cache for current provider and re-fetches
    - Use `useCallback` for the fetch function, proper cleanup with abort/ignore pattern for stale responses
  - Export from `packages/core/src/index.ts` (or hooks barrel)
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: In `packages/core/src/test/hooks/useArenaModels.test.tsx`:
  - Test that models are fetched on mount for the initial provider
  - Test that changing provider triggers a new fetch
  - Test that switching back to a previously fetched provider uses the cache (no re-fetch)
  - Test loading state transitions: `isLoading: true` → `isLoading: false`
  - Test error state when adapter returns `isOk: false`
  - Test `refetch()` clears cache and re-fetches
- **Verify**: Hook fetches models on mount, caches per provider, handles errors. All tests pass.
- **Depends on**: TASK-006

    - Remove usage of `getEnabledModels` import

- **Verify**: Open toolbar → models load dynamically → select a model → switch provider → switch back → last model is pre-selected. Error case shows retry.
- **Depends on**: TASK-002, TASK-007

### TASK-009: Persist lastSelectedModels in ArenaSettings

- [ ] **Implementation**:
  - In the component/hook that manages `ArenaSettings` (likely in the Arena chat container or toolbar parent):
    - When `onSettingsChange({ model: ... })` is called, also update `settings.lastSelectedModels[currentProvider] = selectedModel`
    - Call `adapter.arena.saveSettings(updatedSettings)` to persist
  - Ensure `ArenaSettings.lastSelectedModels` is loaded from persistence on app start (this should happen naturally via `loadSettings()`)
  - In `ArenaChatToolbar`, when provider changes:
    - Check `settings.lastSelectedModels?.[newProvider]`
    - If it exists and is in the fetched model list, select it
    - Otherwise, select the first model in the list
    - If no models available (empty list / error), leave model as undefined
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Test that selecting a model updates `lastSelectedModels`. Test that switching provider restores the last selected model.
- **Verify**: Select model A for Gemini → switch to Ollama → select model B → switch back to Gemini → model A is pre-selected. Restart app → last selections are retained.
- **Depends on**: TASK-008

## 7. Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Auth**: Gemini API key is passed to `listGeminiModels()` from provider settings. The key is already managed securely via `ISecretAdapter`. Ollama requires no auth by default.
- **Error Handling**: All provider `listModels()` functions return empty arrays on failure (no exceptions propagated). The `useArenaModels` hook exposes the error string for UI display. Adapter calls use the `Result<T, E>` pattern.
- **Logging**: Provider functions log warnings on fetch failure (`console.warn`). Hook logs adapter errors for debugging.
- **Security**: API keys are not logged. Gemini API key is passed as a URL query parameter (consistent with Google's API design — already the pattern in `validateGeminiApiKey`). Ollama is local-only by default.
- **Performance**: Models are fetched eagerly on toolbar mount and cached per provider in a `useRef` map. Switching providers uses the cache. `refetch()` is available for manual refresh.
